meaning: 乌尔姆[德意志联邦共和国南部城市](或译乌耳姆)
examples: The highest bell-tower in the world is in the city of Ulm.
Albert Einstein was born in Ulm, Germany on March 14, 1879.
To be an Ulm, Paul must agree to doubt the existence of God.
Using MRI and other technology, DaimlerChrysler's research center in Ulm is studying the brains of drivers as they interact with cars.
At 5:30 the conductor on an express train going from Ulm to Sigmaringen felt a bump and alerted authorities to investigate.
